properties.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(SailPointIDN_Events_CL
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    id_s,
    name_s,
    created_t,
    action_s,
    type_s,
    technicalName_s,
    operation_s,
    status_s,
    actor_name_s,
    target_name_s,
    org_s,
    pod_s,
    stack_s,
    trackingNumber_g,
    synced_t,
    _index_s,
    _type_s,
    objects_s,
    details_g,
    attributes_operation_s,
    attributes_processId_g,
    attributes_duration_s,
    attributes_identitiesProcessed_s,
    attributes_identitiesTotal_s,
    attributes_identitiesSelected_s,
    attributes_groupsDeltaToken_before_s,
    attributes_groupsDeltaToken_after_s,
    attributes_userDeltaToken_before_s,
    attributes_userDeltaToken_after_s,
    attributes_directoryRolesDeltaToken_before_s,
    attributes_directoryRolesDeltaToken_after_s,
    attributes_hostName_s,
    attributes_userId_s,
    attributes_scope_s,
    attributes_sourceId_g,
    attributes_sourceName_s,
    attributes_aggregationId_g,
    attributes_capability_s,
    SourceSystem),
(SailPointIDN_EventsV2_CL
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    id_s = Id,
    name_s = Name,
    created_t = Created,
    action_s = Action,
    type_s = EventType,
    technicalName_s = TechnicalName,
    operation_s = Operation,
    status_s = Status,
    actor_name_s = ActorName,
    target_name_s = TargetName,
    org_s = Org,
    pod_s = Pod,
    stack_s = Stack,
    trackingNumber_g = TrackingNumber,
    synced_t = Synced,
    _index_s = Index,
    _type_s = DocType,
    objects_s = Objects,
    details_g = Details,
    attributes_operation_s = AttributesOperation,
    attributes_processId_g = AttributesProcessId,
    attributes_duration_s = AttributesDuration,
    attributes_identitiesProcessed_s = AttributesIdentitiesProcessed,
    attributes_identitiesTotal_s = AttributesIdentitiesTotal,
    attributes_identitiesSelected_s = AttributesIdentitiesSelected,
    attributes_groupsDeltaToken_before_s = AttributesGroupsDeltaTokenBefore,
    attributes_groupsDeltaToken_after_s = AttributesGroupsDeltaTokenAfter,
    attributes_userDeltaToken_before_s = AttributesUserDeltaTokenBefore,
    attributes_userDeltaToken_after_s = AttributesUserDeltaTokenAfter,
    attributes_directoryRolesDeltaToken_before_s = AttributesDirectoryRolesDeltaTokenBefore,
    attributes_directoryRolesDeltaToken_after_s = AttributesDirectoryRolesDeltaTokenAfter,
    attributes_hostName_s = AttributesHostName,
    attributes_userId_s = AttributesUserId,
    attributes_scope_s = AttributesScope,
    attributes_sourceId_g = AttributesSourceId,
    attributes_sourceName_s = AttributesSourceName,
    attributes_aggregationId_g = AttributesAggregationId,
    attributes_capability_s = AttributesCapability,
    SourceSystem)
